description_long: This is a large, rounded ceramic vase with a wide, bulbous body and a short, slightly flared neck leading to a flat, circular rim. The surface is matte and shows visible signs of age, with patches of discoloration and areas that appear to have been restored or repaired. The coloration is primarily a muted beige with grayish patches, giving it an ancient, weathered appearance. The vase lacks any ornate handles or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian form. Subtle horizontal striations and irregularities in the surface texture suggest it was hand-crafted. Its substantial size and robust build make it suitable for display in public or outdoor urban spaces.
description: A large, rounded beige ceramic vase with a flat rim and visible restoration patches, featuring a weathered, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the widest part of the vase with prominent grayish restoration patches and a clear, flat rim.
description_view_1: This side highlights more subtle discoloration and a slightly more uniform beige tone, with less visible patchwork.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the smoothest and lightest area of the vase, with minimal visible restoration and a clean surface.
description_view_3: This angle displays a mix of beige and faint gray patches, with the rounded body and rim clearly visible.
